headers.name: Subject
headers.value: Inside Kilo Speed: How One Engineer is Replatforming Our VS Code Extension in a Month

snippet: On a Wednesday morning, Mark IJbema sits down at his desk and reviews a pull request. He didn't write the code in it—a Cloud Agent did, overnight. ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏
